Event: Magic Well - November 2024
Event Date: 14/11/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A18


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Explorer Chest
Magic Well Junk Chest
Avian Sign Artifact

Triggers: Start of the battle

The unit increases physical and magic armor by 10% of the physical and magic armor of all allied warriors for the duration of the battle.

Once in a while, the unit steals 20% of physical and magic armor from all enemy warriors for 5 sec. During this time, every second, the unit deals pure damage equal to 150% of the unit's physical armor to all enemy warriors. This damage ignores shields and effects that reduce the targets' incoming damage. The artifact owner restores health to themself and allies in a small radius around the unit equal to 100% of the damage dealt by the ability.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
